name: Alphion Corp.
lede: Alphion runs two centers across two Indian cities. Chennai and Mumbai, covering R&D, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alphion office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alphion Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alphion runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Chennai, Mumbai), covering R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Alphion's India footprint covers Chennai and Mumbai, spanning R&D. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Alphion operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Alphion's India footprint includes Chennai and 1 additional cities.
